title: Default linked issue closure on archive

tasks.title: Update archive close-issue command/spec contract.
tasks.verification: Contract update complete. ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md now says /adv-archive defaults to closing linked GitHub issues for roadmap/triage origins after push verification unless --no-close-issue is passed. adv-archive.md documents --no-close-issue, keeps --close-issue as backward-compatible explicit affirmative/no-op, and gates close on origin.kind, issue_number, and push verification. adv-triage.md wording updated to avoid implying --close-issue is required.
tasks.summary: Updated archive issue-close command/spec contract and verified no active default-off opt-in wording remains outside historical archive bundles. Checkpoint clean because changes were included in prior GREEN commit beef304.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated archive issue-close command/spec contract and verified no active default-off opt-in wording remains outside historical archive bundles. Checkpoint clean because changes were included in prior GREEN commit beef304.

tasks.title: Update or add asset tests for issue-close default contract.
tasks.verification: Completed RED/GREEN asset test for default linked issue closure. Contract/docs were updated to make the test pass: default-on roadmap/triage linked issue close after push verification, --no-close-issue opt-out, --close-issue backward-compatible no-op.
tasks.summary: Added asset coverage in plugin/src/adv-autonomy-quality-assets.test.ts and updated ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md, .opencode/command/adv-archive.md, and .opencode/command/adv-triage.md to satisfy the default linked issue closure contract.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added asset coverage in plugin/src/adv-autonomy-quality-assets.test.ts and updated ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md, .opencode/command/adv-archive.md, and .opencode/command/adv-triage.md to satisfy the default linked issue closure contract.

tasks.title: Final verification for default linked issue closure.
tasks.verification: Final verification complete. Active-text search outside historical archive bundles found no stale default-off/opt-in contract wording except test negative assertions. Targeted asset test passed. pnpm run check passed.
tasks.summary: Verified default linked issue closure contract change via active-text search, targeted asset tests, and repo-defined check command. Worktree clean at beef304.
tasks.implementation_summary: Verified default linked issue closure contract change via active-text search, targeted asset tests, and repo-defined check command. Worktree clean at beef304.

wisdom.content: When updating archive issue-close contract, ignore historical `.adv/archive/**` references during active-text searches; they preserve old archived behavior and should not be rewritten for new command semantics.

proposal.approval_evidence: User requested this change and replied `continue` after proposed behavior. Proposal defines default close for roadmap/triage linked issues, --no-close-issue opt-out, and non-fatal failure semantics.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed. Current behavior is command/spec-owned. Agreement: flip rq-issueChangeLinkage02 to default-on for roadmap/triage linked origins, add --no-close-issue opt-out, keep --close-issue compatible, keep failure non-fatal and non-linked origins no-op.

design.approval_evidence: Design validated. Validator verdict VALIDATED. Command/spec-only update flips linked issue closure default for roadmap/triage origins after push verification, adds --no-close-issue opt-out, keeps --close-issue compatibility, no runtime tool changes.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep task graph by replying `approve`. Tasks: contract/docs update, asset tests, final verification. TDD intents approved: docs task not_applicable, tests inline, final verification separate_verification.

execution.approval_evidence: All 3 execution tasks complete. Checkpoint commit beef304 includes command/spec/test updates. Verification: active stale-default-off search passed, targeted asset test passed (2080 passed, 2 skipped), pnpm run check passed.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work by replying `accept`. Review findings: 0 blockers, 0 issues, 0 suggestions, 0 questions. Verification passed: RED/GREEN asset test, stale-text search, pnpm run check, ADV validation with only expected NO_DELTAS advisory.

release.approval_evidence: User signed off release with `sign off`. Pre-archive checks passed: all tasks done, validation passed with expected NO_DELTAS advisory, investment report collected. Proceeding to archive and git finalization.
